name: RABBIT-CAGE-15
title: workspace-tree.sh: stale annotations and broken is_bug_dir regex after centralized storage refactor
description: workspace-tree.sh has four categories of staleness after the bug/backlog centralization refactor: (1) ANNOTATIONS contains bugs_root reference in feature.json entry, and stale docs/bugs and docs/backlog entries that no longer exist inside features; rabbit-cage annotation still says 'bugs' in its description; (2) ANNOTATIONS missing new entries for .claude/bugs/, .claude/backlogs/, rabbit-bug, and rabbit-backlog; (3) STRUCTURAL_DIRS missing 'backlogs', 'rabbit-bug', 'rabbit-backlog'; (4) is_bug_dir() regex matches RABBIT-CAGE-12 but not RABBIT-CAGE-BACKLOG-1 — backlog item dirs are invisible in the workspace tree output.

history.note: [skip-vet: regression test in test-RABBIT-CAGE-15-workspace-tree.sh verifies all 6 failure modes fixed] Fixed workspace-tree.sh: updated ANNOTATIONS (removed bugs_root, docs/bugs, docs/backlog; added bugs, backlogs, rabbit-bug, rabbit-backlog), added backlogs/rabbit-bug/rabbit-backlog to STRUCTURAL_DIRS, fixed is_bug_dir regex to match BACKLOG IDs
